discussion_summary: The voice subsystem had multiple entry points for spoken notifications, each using different voice configurations. Prior sessions refactored all call sites to route through a single `announce()` function and changed the default voice to Zarvox per user preference. A previous session discovered and fixed a bug where `speak()` did not guard against empty messages; the fix adds an early return when text is empty. Earlier research confirmed that switching between Claude Code sessions in different repositories is an open gap (Claude Code locks `.claude/` config to session-start directory) and not solved by upstream tooling, making it a potential feature for askr to address. The session traced quota warning announcement triggers through `lifecycle.py`, `usage_api.py`, and `post_tool_use.py` hooks to understand how `quota_pct` flows from the Anthropic API into voice announcements, and examined credential handling and webhook patterns in the codebase. This session launched five parallel audit agents to investigate daemon logging paths, security scanning, IDE extension polling intervals, and the root cause of the voice/quota bug. Two audits have completed: security scan found no command-injection or leaked-secrets issues but identified a rejected-and-supposedly-fixed `getpass()` bug still present in Discord webhook prompt code; ask CLI and qa pipeline audit completed with findings on ask log command and cost_summary integration.

accomplishments.what: Refactored all spoken announcements to use unified `announce()` pipeline
Verified all bare `speak()` call sites eliminated and routed through `announce()`
Changed default single-voice mode from Samantha to Zarvox
Confirmed test suite passes after voice refactor
Committed and pushed voice unification (00bd902) and default voice change (80d2625)
Fixed empty-text handling in `speak()` to skip subprocess call when message is empty
Added comprehensive tests for empty-string handling in `speak()`, `speak_signature()`, and `announce()`
Verified full test suite (173 tests) passes after empty-text fix
Researched cross-repo Claude Code session switching problem and confirmed it is an open gap not solved upstream
Traced quota warning announcement flow through lifecycle.py, usage_api.py, and post_tool_use.py hooks to understand quota_pct sourcing and voice trigger mechanisms
Examined credential handling patterns and webhook configuration in askr/clients/discord.py and usage_api.py
Launched five parallel audit agents to investigate daemon logging paths, security scanning, IDE extension polling, and voice/quota bug root causes

Completed security scan and IDE extension audit — confirmed no command-injection or leaked-secrets issues; identified rejected-and-supposedly-fixed getpass() bug still present in Discord webhook prompt
Completed ask CLI and qa pipeline audit — reviewed ask log command, cost_summary integration, and session cost tracking

in_progress.what: Collating results from three remaining parallel audit agents (packaging/install, hooks/state/guard, voice/daemon bug deep-dive) to identify root cause of quota announcement voice bug and finalize audit findings table

next_actions.action: Handover generation failed/truncated this session — review transcript manually before continuing

decisions.decision: Route all spoken announcements through unified `announce()` function instead of direct `speak()` calls
decisions.reason: Centralizes voice configuration, ensures consistent voice selection, and simplifies future voice-related changes

decisions.decision: Default single-voice mode to Zarvox instead of Samantha
decisions.reason: User preference; Zarvox provides better voice quality for announcements

decisions.decision: Guard `speak()` function against empty text messages with early return
decisions.reason: Prevents spurious subprocess calls and subprocess errors when announcement text is empty

decisions.decision: Cross-repo Claude Code session switching is an open gap not solved by upstream tooling and is a potential feature for askr
decisions.reason: Claude Code locks `.claude/` config to session-start directory; switching between repos requires manual workaround; askr could address this

relational_files.why: Contains quota warning announcement triggers and lifecycle hooks that feed quota_pct into voice subsystem
Handles Anthropic API quota_pct data and credential management; feeds quota warnings to announcement pipeline
Post-tool-use hook that triggers quota announcements; part of quota warning flow
Core voice subsystem; fixed empty-text handling and unified announce() pipeline; tested by test suite
Contains webhook credential handling and getpass() bug identified by security audit
Tests for voice subsystem including empty-text handling and announce() pipeline

blockers: Three of five parallel audit agents still pending completion (packaging/install, hooks/state/guard, voice/daemon bug deep-dive); cannot finalize root-cause analysis until all results are collated
